commit.message:
fix: register service worker via SerwistProvider for iOS PWA

The service worker was built but never registered — SerwistProvider
from @serwist/next/react was missing. Also adds manifest id field
for stable iOS 16.4+ PWA identity.

fix: disable navigationPreload for iOS PWA + sync-complete event

- Disable navigationPreload in SW (broke iOS standalone mode + offline)
- Move themeColor from metadata to viewport export (Next.js warning)
- Emit sync-complete event after syncPendingMutations succeeds
- CaeTab listens for sync-complete to refresh data immediately

fix: video upload webm support + PWA standalone mode preservation

- Add "webm" to CAE_ALLOWED_TYPES (backend rejected MediaRecorder output)
- Add 5min timeout to file upload requests (was 30s global default)
- Replace hard location.href redirects with event-based auth-logout pattern
- Use router.replace instead of router.push for PWA navigation stability
- Add viewport export to root layout for iOS PWA rendering

- Stripe webhook: removed supabase client shadowing in switch cases

HIGH:

MEDIUM:
- UUID validation on conversations/messages and chat routes
- Onboarding use cases: French → English keys

LOW:
- Welcome email: shield → zap emoji
- Documents pagination: 500 → 100

commit.message:
docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enable HTTP server request metrics for Prometheus/Grafana

Enable HTTP server observations and histogram distribution so that
http_server_requests_seconds_bucket and _count metrics are exposed
on the actuator/prometheus endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix post creation to use JSON request body instead of query params

Add @RequestBody to FeedController, send content as JSON body in load
test client, and configure Redis ObjectMapper with JavaTimeModule for
proper date serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which
fails on the :ro mounted init-graph.cypher. The file is already
mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement news feed system with fanout architecture

Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 app with Nginx load balancer, Post Service
(PostgreSQL + Redis cache), Fanout Service (RabbitMQ → workers → News Feed
Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add verified prediction market trading platform

Four AI agents scan prediction markets, commit predictions on-chain
via Chainlink CRE, and get scored by an independent oracle via
Chainlink Functions. Contracts deployed on Ethereum Sepolia and
verified on Tenderly Virtual TestNet.

- SignalRegistry + AccuracyLedger with real Chainlink DON scoring
- SeptonsVault with Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
- Market Scout, Autonomous Trader, Portfolio Manager, Intelligence Advisor
- Next.js dashboard with RainbowKit wallet connect
- CRE signal recorder workflow
- Deploy scripts for Sepolia and Tenderly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Milestone 2 — currency, income, and local save (#2)

Currency
- GameState adds add_currency(), deduct_currency(), currency_changed signal
- Placing a trailer costs 100 coins (data-driven via data/trailers.json)
- TrailerPlacer adds insufficient_funds signal; checks balance before placing
- CurrencyLabel in UI updates live via currency_changed signal

Income
- IncomeManager ticks every 5s; each trailer earns 10 coins per tick
- Rates are read from data/trailers.json — no hardcoded values in scripts

Save / Load
- SaveSystem serializes GameState (currency + lots) to user://save.json
- Auto-saves on every trailer placement
- Auto-loads on startup — park persists across sessions

Scene
- Main.tscn: added IncomeManager, SaveSystem nodes and CurrencyLabel

feat: add Gather button with visual/audio feedback

Gather (pull orbs to center) was popular via keyboard (C key) but had no
visible button. Added it next to Scatter as its natural complement, with
screen shake, ripple, and swoosh sound to match other effects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Feat: multishot designer with per-shot camera movement selection

- pipeline.py: remove CHUNK_SIZE chunking — each scene is now an independent
  Kling API call (1 shot per call). Fixes scenes being grouped into one request.
  Adds background_extra_urls param for per-shot background cycling:
  if multiple backgrounds provided, each shot uses bg_pool[i % N] (no chaining);
  if single background, last-frame chaining is kept for visual continuity.
- main.py: add library_background_extra_urls Form field, parse as JSON list,
  pass as background_extra_urls to run_pipeline.
- app.js: add libraryBgExtraUrls state; populated from item.extra_urls when
  a background library item is selected; sent as library_background_extra_urls
  in formData; reset on clearLibraryBg and new video.

and restored on revisit. Directories without saved sort default
to name ascending instead of inheriting from previous directory.

Reposition speech & thought bubbles to point from amy's head

clearly originate from her head rather than her body.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add CLI pipeline (qtmesh) for headless mesh operations (#178)

* Add extra Assimp flags support to CLI fix command

Simplify FixOptions to only expose --remove-degenerates and
--merge-materials as extra flags on top of the standard import pipeline
(which already applies join-vertices, smooth-normals, optimize, etc.).
Thread additionalFlags through MeshImporterExporter::importer() and
AssimpToOgreImporter::loadModel() so they get OR'd into the standard
Assimp post-processing flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add CLI pipeline integration and documentation

Wire CLIPipeline into main.cpp with automatic detection via qtmesh
symlink, --cli flag, or recognized subcommand. Create qtmesh symlink
at build time (macOS/Linux) and batch wrapper (Windows). Expose
AnimationMerger::renameAnimation as public API for CLI anim --rename.
Suppress Ogre/Qt debug noise in test output. Document all CLI commands
in CLAUDE.md and README.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add CLI pipeline section to docs/index.html

Document all qtmesh commands (info, convert, fix, anim, merge-animations)
in the project landing page. Update existing CLI references to use the
qtmesh command instead of ./QtMeshEditor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Refactor merge-animations into anim --merge and improve CLI coverage

Consolidate the standalone `merge-animations` command into the existing
`anim` subcommand as `--merge`, matching the pattern of `--list` and
`--rename`. Remove legacy merge handling from main.cpp.

Address CodeRabbit review feedback:
- P1: Guard anim --rename against duplicate target animation names
- P2: Verify each merge animation file loaded successfully
- Add POSIX shell note to docs for Windows users

Add 30+ process-based CLI tests covering all subcommands, error paths,
and flag combinations for near-complete CLIPipeline coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address remaining CodeRabbit review feedback

- Remove unnecessary QApplication from --help/--version/no-command paths
  (fixes crash on headless X11 systems, speeds up help/version output)
- Fix info --json for multi-entity imports: emit single object for one
  entity, JSON array for multiple entities
- Fix CLI auto-detection to handle --verbose before subcommand
  (e.g., "QtMeshEditor --verbose info foo.fbx" now routes to CLI)
- Replace hard-coded /tmp/ paths in tests with QDir::tempPath() for
  Windows portability
- Add Windows qtmesh.cmd note to docs/index.html and README.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix FBX Blender compatibility and SkeletonDebug missing bones

FBX exporter: Create one Model per submesh so Blender sees all meshes
(previously N Geometries on one Model caused Blender to use only the last).
Set Transform = bone_global^{-1} in skin clusters for correct mesh positioning.
Use writeP70enum for TimeMode (fixes Blender 3.5+ assertion). Remove
non-deforming bone inversion — all bones now use raw transforms for both
export (FBXExporter) and import (BoneProcessor), ensuring correct positions
in Blender and other tools. Add processNonSkinnedBone for leaf/tip bones.

SkeletonDebug: Use getInitialPosition() instead of getPosition() for bone
length filtering, so bones aren't skipped based on animated positions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Bump version to 2.11.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
chore(deps): consolidate security dependency updates (#895)

* chore(deps): consolidate security dependency updates

統合したセキュリティアップデート：

## 重要なセキュリティ修正

- dompurify: 3.3.0 → 3.3.2
  - プロトタイプ汚染の修正
  - jsdomパース問題によるバイパス修正
  - レニエントな設定パースの修正

- ai-sdk関連パッケージ: SSRF脆弱性修正
  - @ai-sdk/gateway: 3.0.57 → 3.0.66
  - @ai-sdk/react: 3.0.51 → 3.0.66
  - ai: 6.0.103 → 6.0.111
  - download関数でのURL検証追加
  - secureJsonParseでのUnicodeエスケープバイパス防止

## その他の依存関係更新

- @trpc/client: 11.10.0 → 11.12.0
- @trpc/server: 11.10.0 → 11.12.0
- @trpc/react-query: 11.10.0 → 11.12.0
- hono: 4.11.10 → 4.12.5
- @hono/node-server: 1.19.6 → 1.19.11
- turbo: 2.8.3 → 2.8.14
- framer-motion: 11.18.2 → 12.35.1
- jotai: 2.15.2 → 2.18.0

Closes #894, #893, #891, #887, #886, #875, #874, #873

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore(deps): remove unused @typescript/native-preview

@typescript/native-previewはプレビュー版であり、コード内で使用されていないため削除。

Closes #872

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix error handling, broken images, and N+1 dispatch queries - Add error state UI to Sales, Alerts, and Upcoming pages (were silently showing empty state on query failure) - Add broken image fallback on GameCard and GameCardCompact (empty coverArt caused broken ) - Fix N+1 queries in dispatch.ts: batch dedup check via single IN query, pre-fetch all franchise IDs in one query, parallelize game/franchise follower lookups per alert Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

commit.message:
refactor: MIDOS v0.3.0 — 방어적 코딩 + 테스트 + 확장성 개선

[입력 검증]
  core/biology.py    — lifespan <= 0 ValueError, scale > 2.5 UserWarning
                       파라미터 근거 주석 강화 (Berner 2003, HBO 임상, FACE 실험)
                       로지스틱 파라미터 근거 주석 추가
  core/gravity.py    — pressure <= 0 ValueError, 절대영도 이하 ValueError
  units/conversions.py — m_to_cubits() ZeroDivisionError 방지
  validator.py       — implied <= 0 방어 처리 (skip)

[원형 논리 명시]
  units/cubit_standards.py — CUBIT_HYPER 주석 강화
    "이 값은 MIDOS 모델 자체 출력값 — 독립 검증 아님" 경고 블록 추가

[시나리오 엔진]
  scenario_engine.py — 문자열 키 매칭 fallback 개선
    키 미발견 시 조용히 0 반환 → 순서 기반 fallback으로 교체

[확장성]
  why_it_measures.py — MidosResult에 extra_structures 필드 추가
    tuple[tuple[str, StructureResult], ...] = ()
    structures_dict 프로퍼티로 dict 접근 지원
    Phase 3에서 새 구조물 추가 시 코드 수정 불필요

[테스트]
  tests/test_midos.py — 신규 (15개 테스트, 15/15 통과)
    biology 6개 / conversions 2개 / validator 2개 / pipeline 5개

centered to match the rest of the info overlay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: parallel BigTIFF processing based on available resources

Dynamic slot calculation: min(freeRAM/3GB, cpuCores/4, 8)
- 16GB RAM / 14 cores → 2 parallel slides
- 32GB RAM / 14 cores → 5 parallel slides
- 64GB RAM / 32 cores → 8 parallel slides

BIGTIFF jobs run concurrently while P0/P1/TILEGEN remain sequential.
Recalculates slots before each job to adapt to current memory pressure.
Graceful shutdown waits for active BigTIFF jobs to complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use request.url_for consistently across all templates

Bare url_for() doesn't respect root_path behind reverse proxies.
Switches static asset refs in base.html and form action in settings.html
to request.url_for() for full reverse proxy compatibility.

commit.message:
Add GUI roadmap with Paperclip-inspired feature plan (#133)

## Summary

- Adds a phased GUI roadmap to `gui/DESIGN.md` based on analysis of
[paperclipai/paperclip](https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip)
- 5 phases (A–E) with 13 features, ordered by priority (effort vs user
value)
- Includes a "Not Planned" section for intentionally excluded features

### Phases

- **A — Foundation:** shadcn/ui migration, TanStack Query
- **B — Quick Wins:** Command palette (Cmd+K), breadcrumbs, skeleton
loaders, mobile nav
- **C — Monitoring:** Active agents live feed, activity charts,
cost/token tracking
- **D — Task Management:** Kanban board, goal tree
- **E — Governance:** Approval queue (human-in-the-loop),
heartbeat/scheduled runs

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify `gui/DESIGN.md` renders correctly on GitHub
- [ ] Confirm top-level `DESIGN.md` is unchanged

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Add Breakdown Engine Round 2 research - Fractured AI Boxes system

Round 2 research advancing the spreadsheet integration breakdown engine:

- R2_FRACTURED_BOXES: Discrete, inspectable AI reasoning containers
  - 50+ box types across 6 categories (Reasoning, Action, Data, Control, Validate, Metadata)
  - Box composition patterns (Serial, Parallel, Conditional, Loop)
  - Full TypeScript interfaces and implementations
  - AgentCell integration with logic levels 0-3

- R2_MODEL_CASCADE: Multi-model orchestration strategy
  - Tiered model selection (Tiny → Small → Medium → Large)
  - Cost optimization through intelligent routing

- R2_TOKENIZATION_PROTOCOL: Input/output token handling
  - Streaming tokenization for real-time processing
  - Token budget management per box

- R2_TRANSFORMER_LAYERS: Layer-by-layer breakdown mapping
  - Attention pattern visualization
  - Hidden state inspection points

- R2_AMBIGUITY_RESOLUTION: Disambiguation strategies
  - Context-aware resolution boxes
  - Confidence scoring and escalation

- R2_ORCHESTRATOR_PROTOCOL: Large model coordination
  - Box execution scheduling
  - Resource management and caching

- R2_SUMMARY & R2_QUICKREF: Consolidated documentation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Split :core into :arch, :arch-android, and :ui modules (#4)

* Upgrade Gradle, AGP, and add JVM toolchain configuration

- Bump AGP from 9.0.0 to 9.1.0
- Upgrade Gradle wrapper from 9.1.0 to 9.3.1
- Add foojay toolchain resolver plugin to settings.gradle.kts
- Add gradle-daemon-jvm.properties with JetBrains JDK 21 toolchain URLs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Split :core into :arch, :arch-android, and :ui modules

- :arch (com.composure.arch): platform-agnostic UDF pipeline (Feature, CoreFeature, StandardFeature, Interactor)
- :arch-android (com.composure.arch): Android ViewModel wrapper (ViewModelFeature), depends on :arch via api()
- :ui (com.composure.ui): Compose screen binding helpers (Screen, StandardScreen), depends on :arch-android
- Removed :core module; updated :compose dependencies and all com.arch.udf imports to new namespaces
- All tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add .gitignore files to new modules and untrack build artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace api() with implementation() for explicit module dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix CI workflow to use unified test command after module split

Replace stale :core:test and :compose:test steps with a single
./gradlew test that covers all modules including the new :arch
and :arch-android modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Upgrade CI to JDK 21 to satisfy AGP 9.1.0 requirement

AGP 9.1.0 requires Java 21 to run the Gradle build daemon. Using JDK 17
caused Foojay to attempt auto-provisioning Java 21, which failed with HTTP 400.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add ktlint and .editorconfig for consistent Kotlin formatting

- Add jlleitschuh/ktlint-gradle (v12.1.2) applied to all submodules via
  root subprojects block; use ktlintCheck to verify, ktlintFormat to fix
- Add .editorconfig enforcing UTF-8, LF, 4-space indent, 120-char line
  length for .kt/.kts, and final newlines across the project
- Fix pre-existing trailing-comma violations in build.gradle.kts files
  (arch, arch-android, compose) surfaced by ktlint
- Update CLAUDE.md to reflect current module names and package paths
  after the :core → :arch/:arch-android/:ui split

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix font overuse and headline proactiveness

Fonts: monospace now only for actual code-like data (request ID
hashes, latency, token counts, costs). Everything else — model
names, cache hit/miss, status codes, stat labels, column headers,
insight bar, panel title — uses Inter/Ronzino as in the real app.

Headline: "We watch every AI call. Then we fix it." — captures
the proactive optimization angle instead of the routing pitch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(db): batch duplicate check with a single SQL IN query

Added `MetadataRegistry.get_existing_accessions()` which accepts a list
of accession numbers and returns the subset already present in a single
`SELECT ... WHERE IN (...)` query. Previously every filing triggered an
individual `is_duplicate()` call, causing O(N) SQLite round-trips per
ingest batch.

All three ingest paths (CLI `_ingest_one_form`, `_ingest_across_forms`,
`batch`, and API `TaskManager._execute`) now call
`get_existing_accessions()` once before the per-filing loop and check
membership against the returned set in O(1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: SEC-SemanticSearch
repository.description: Natural language search for SEC filings. Fetch 10-K/10-Q from EDGAR, parse into segments, chunk text, generate GPU-accelerated embeddings (google/embeddinggemma-300m, 768-dim), store in ChromaDB+SQLite dual-store. Rich CLI with progress bars, color-coded output, flexible filtering. Returns relevant passages not generated answers. MIT licensed.
